_publications._publicationTitle: Chromosome 8 gain is associated with high-grade transformation in MPNST
_publications._context: WU-225 established from primary thigh NF1-MPNST; characterized for chromosome 8q gain (100%); one of 8 NF1-MPNST lines

_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology
_publications._fundingAgency: NTAP; NCI; Department of Defense CDMRP
_publications._context: WU-225 assembled into 3D microtissues with good viability (>50% at 48 h); used for ex vivo drug response testing (trabectedin, olaparib, mirdametinib); ex vivo drug response predicted in vivo response

_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors
_publications._context: eight PDXs [JH-2-002, JH-2-031, JH-2-079c, WU-225, WU-386, WU-545, MN-2, and MN-3-002] were generated in our laboratories

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated MPNST cell line established at Washington University from a primary thigh NF1-MPNST; characterized for chromosome 8q gain (100%)
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Division of Oncology, Washington University School of Medicine
